title: Planning a destination wedding in India: where to begin
excerpt: Palaces, beaches or backwaters - how to choose the perfect setting for your big day.
body:
A destination wedding is a journey, not just a day.

Start with the season and the vibe you want - royal, coastal, or serene. Then we handle venues, travel, decor and every ritual.

Tell us your date and we will craft the rest.

title: Five ways to make your Sangeet unforgettable
excerpt: Choreography, live acts and lighting that turn a night into a memory.
body:
The Sangeet is where the celebration truly begins.

From surprise family performances to a live band and a stage built for the moment, every detail sets the mood.

We design the flow so everyone dances and no one stresses.
